description: CLI for managing Framer websites — CMS, canvas, code files, publishing, and site migration. Requires Node.js 18+ and the framer-api npm package.

tools.name: assets_add-image
tools.description: Add image from URL. Required: url.

tools.name: assets_upload
tools.description: Upload an image or file asset.

tools.name: changes_contributors
tools.description: List contributors who made changes in a version range.

tools.name: changes_list
tools.description: List added, removed, and modified paths since last publish.

tools.name: cms-collections_create
tools.description: Create a new CMS collection. Required: name.

tools.name: cms-collections_get
tools.description: Get collection details including fields and item count. Required: id.

tools.name: cms-collections_list
tools.description: List all CMS collections.

tools.name: cms-fields_update
tools.description: Add, remove, or reorder collection fields. Required: collection_id. Partial update.

tools.name: cms-items_get
tools.description: Get a CMS item with all field data. Required: id.

tools.name: cms-items_list
tools.description: List all items in a collection. Required: collection_id.

tools.name: cms-items_remove
tools.description: Remove CMS items by ID. Destructive.

tools.name: cms-items_upsert
tools.description: Create or update CMS items in batch. Required: collection_id.

tools.name: code_create
tools.description: Create a new code file. Required: name.

tools.name: code_get
tools.description: Get code file content. Required: id.

tools.name: code_list
tools.description: List all code files in the project.

tools.name: code_typecheck
tools.description: Run TypeScript type checking on a code file. Required: id.

tools.name: components_add
tools.description: Add a component instance by URL or name. Optional: url.

tools.name: custom-code_get
tools.description: Get installed custom code snippets.

tools.name: custom-code_set
tools.description: Install custom code at head or body insertion points.

tools.name: fonts_list
tools.description: List all available fonts with weights and styles.

tools.name: i18n_groups
tools.description: Get localization groups with translation status.

tools.name: i18n_locales
tools.description: List all project locales.

tools.name: nodes_add-svg
tools.description: Add an SVG element to the canvas.

tools.name: nodes_children
tools.description: Get child nodes of a node. Required: id.

tools.name: nodes_clone
tools.description: Clone a node. Required: id.

tools.name: nodes_create-frame
tools.description: Create a new frame node. Optional: parent.

tools.name: nodes_create-text
tools.description: Create a new text node. Required: content. Optional: parent.

tools.name: nodes_find
tools.description: Find nodes by type, attribute, or name. Optional: type, attr, name.

tools.name: nodes_get
tools.description: Get node by ID with all attributes. Required: id.

tools.name: nodes_remove
tools.description: Remove a node. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: nodes_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a node as PNG/JPEG. Required: id.

tools.name: nodes_set
tools.description: Set node attributes. Required: id. Partial update.

tools.name: nodes_set-text
tools.description: Set text content of a text node. Required: id, content. Partial update.

tools.name: pages_create
tools.description: Create a new page. Required: name. Optional: type.

tools.name: pages_list
tools.description: List all pages in the project.

tools.name: project_info
tools.description: Get project name, ID, and metadata.

tools.name: project_user
tools.description: Get current authenticated user info.

tools.name: publish_deploy
tools.description: Promote a published deployment to production. Required: deployment_id.

tools.name: publish_preview
tools.description: Create a preview deployment with a shareable URL.

tools.name: redirects_add
tools.description: Add redirects to the project.

tools.name: redirects_list
tools.description: List all project redirects.

tools.name: redirects_remove
tools.description: Remove redirects from the project. Destructive.

tools.name: styles-colors_create
tools.description: Create a new color style. Required: name, value.

tools.name: styles-colors_list
tools.description: List all color styles.

tools.name: styles-text_create
tools.description: Create a new text style.

tools.name: styles-text_list
tools.description: List all text styles.
